name: Carehub

metric.label: Impact
metric.value: Consultation, history & paid-diagnosis modules for clinics + patients

highlights: Developed consultation, patient history, healer management, and paid diagnosis modules for a digital health and wellness platform.
Built high-performance PostgreSQL-backed REST APIs and integrated Razorpay payments and Twilio notifications.
Used OpenAI vector search to improve patient record retrieval accuracy.
Deployed and monitored services on AWS EC2/S3 and assisted with CI/CD and junior mentoring.

name: BAA eLearn

metric.label: Impact
metric.value: 50% faster video load times · 40% higher task throughput

highlights: Built core features for courses, enrollments, progress tracking, and instructor analytics dashboards.
Integrated Razorpay payments with async verification, cutting payment issues by ~25%.
Implemented Celery + Redis queues, boosting background task throughput by ~40%.
Managed AWS MediaConvert, CloudFront, and Lambda for video delivery, cutting load times by 50%.
Led junior developers, reviewed code, and ensured on-time delivery across modules.

name: Nadiswara
highlights: Designed backend architecture for real-time device streaming and patient report generation.
Implemented Celery + Redis pipelines, reducing report processing time by ~40% and API latency by 30–35%.
Built a Razorpay webhook system for payments and automated OTP delivery via Twilio.
Generated diagnostic PDFs using WeasyPrint and containerized services on AWS EC2 for improved stability.
Supported hardware R&D, validating device sensors and signal quality across 2,000+ real patients.

name: Tongue Analysis
highlights: Built backend APIs in Django & MySQL to process tongue images and symptoms for automated diagnosis.
Integrated ML outputs from AWS Sagemaker, ensuring smooth model–API interaction.
Improved API response time by ~20% through query optimization.
Supported deployment on EC2 & S3, using Bitbucket and Postman for workflow testing.
